inlineContent.text: Navigators enable imperative, programatic control of their associated navigation stacks,
Navigators work with other navigators in the navigation tree to enable global operations like
sending navigation values or returning to a parent’s checkpoint.
Navigators are accessible from the environment. Just access them from within any view contained by

abstract.text: Every ManagedNavigationStack has a Navigator to manage it.
True if the current ManagedNavigationStack or navigationDismissible is presented.
Retrieves mapped values for external navigation modes.

Returns NavigationDestination of sheet or cover we’re currently presenting, if any.
Returns the root Navigator in the navigation tree.
Returns true if navigation is locked.
To get the most out of Navigator you need to understand the navigation tree where its Navigators live.
